projectList.title: SmeetH
projectList.content: A social platform that allows users to upload photos and videos, with features such as search, chat, top-up payments, and post publishing.
projectList.fullTitle: SmeetH - Private Dating | Chat App | Amateur Video Platform | smeeth.in
projectList.fullDescription: SmeetH is a large-scale social chatting platform where users can interact with creators through private messages, photos, and videos. Users can unlock exclusive content, browse posts, and enjoy real-time one-on-one conversations.

projectList.title: Single Page Portfolio Project
projectList.content: A frontend project inspired by the vue-vben-admin architecture. Currently deployed on GitHub Pages as a demonstration project.
projectList.fullDescription: GitHub is where people build software. More than 100 million people use GitHub to discover, fork, and contribute to over 420 million projects.

eventList.title: Inception
eventList.content: This task board is designed for SG (streamer hosts) on the platform, aiming to encourage creators to stay active and engage more with users.

eventList.title: Guess Number
eventList.content: This event is open to all users regardless of identity. The goal is to encourage users to spend diamonds through prediction and reward mechanics.

eventList.title: Gift Package
eventList.content: This event integrates the in-app backpack, coupons, and gift systems by bundling smaller items into discounted packages.

eventList.title: Running Hamster
eventList.content: An interactive event featuring animated hamster interactions. Hosts can create hamsters and participate in activities involving animated gameplay elements.

eventList.title: Enthusiasm Moon Festival
eventList.content: A Mid-Autumn Festival event where users can play a card-flipping game to earn mooncakes and Moon God points, or purchase Jade Rabbits using diamonds.

eventList.title: Ghost Appearances
eventList.content: A Halloween-themed event where users can play games to earn pumpkin lanterns and send them to their favorite creators.

eventList.title: Win Heart Now
eventList.content: Since chatting with creators normally requires spending diamonds, this event introduces alternative interaction methods between users and creators.
